data.Description: Built and developed from scratch a platform that met the research center’s requirements and centralized data management, enabling secure document storage and retrieval in one place. The system implemented role-based user authentication within projects, allowing users to upload research outputs and annual work reports and respond to project managers. The website also enabled tracking of instruments and transportation assets, including usage history, assigned users, and availability timelines. Additionally, the platform automated key workflows, including approval processes, and supported management leads in conducting end-of-year PMP evaluations.
data.Tech Skills: HTML, CSS, Bootstrap Javascript, Microsoft SQL Server
data.Soft Skills: Cross-Functional Collaboration, Requirements Gathering & Stakeholder Management, Problem Solving, Process Automation & Optimization, Analytical Thinking, Attention to Detail, Communication & Documentation, Time Management, Ownership & Initiative, Adaptability
